subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-04-21
subcodes.first_line: What the Minister of the Church delineated before us just now testifies to his high sense of morality and his efforts to serve the world of humanity.
subcodes.first_line_orig: آنچه قسیس فرمودند دلیل بر حسن اخلاق و خدمت بعالم انسانى است
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @spirit of faith [ruh-i-'iman], @oneness; unity of religion, @contention and conflict, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @twofold; threefold station of the Manifestation of God
